g.text: Many consumers, many providers, no static wiring. A rendezvous protocol pairs them; a heartbeat detects the dead.
provider:announce → consumer subscribes on the first one
no announce yet? consumer retries query — backoff 500 ms → 5000 ms, up to 10×
provider now collects only the subscribed features —
collapse a panel, the work stops
drop consumer if no ack for ACK_GRACE_MS
